modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help with maintaining F1/J1 visa status requirements.

full_description_text: 
I’m not really sure what I need to do to keep my visa status. Like, I heard there are rules or something for F1 and J1 students, but it’s all kinda confusing. Do I have to fill out forms or report to someone? I just want to make sure I don’t mess it up and lose my status.
short_description: Need help with maintaining F1/J1 visa status requirements.
description: I’m not really sure what I need to do to keep my visa status. Like, I heard there are rules or something for F1 and J1 students, but it’s all kinda confusing. Do I have to fill out forms or report to someone? I just want to make sure I don’t mess it up and lose my status.
